description_long: This is an elegant, upholstered chaise with a high, rounded backrest and gently curved armrests on both sides. The frame appears to be made of wood with a distressed, light finish, giving it a vintage or French provincial look. The seat is wide and plush, featuring a single, thick seat cushion and a large, decorative back cushion with a subtle geometric pattern. The legs are slender, turned, and fluted, adding to the refined aesthetic. The upholstery is a light, neutral fabric, possibly linen or cotton, with a smooth, matte finish. The overall design is inviting and comfortable, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A vintage-style upholstered chaise with a high, rounded back, curved armrests, and slender, fluted wooden legs. It features light, neutral fabric and a large decorative cushion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, rounded backrest, both curved armrests, the wide seat cushion, and the large decorative back cushion.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the curvature of the backrest, and the profile of the armrest and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous backrest with no visible seams or decorations, and the rounded shape of the frame.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, leg profile, and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, rounded, and gently curves inward, providing ample support. It is smooth and unsegmented, with no visible tufting or decorative cutouts, and is fully upholstered in a light fabric.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, which are gently curved and upholstered, seamlessly integrated into the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, turned, and fluted, made of wood with a light, distressed finish. They have a classic, decorative style typical of vintage or French provincial furniture.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is primarily solid light beige or off-white fabric, with the back cushion featuring a subtle geometric pattern. The fabric appears smooth and matte, with no tufting or quilting on the main body.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is one large, loose back cushion with a geometric pattern and one thick, attached seat cushion. The cushions are arranged for maximum comfort and support, with the back cushion resting against the high backrest.
